head:
1	name: Claude Code
     2	
     3	# BEM-477: added transport result write + file report
     4	# BEM-488: YAML-safe rewrite — no f-string multiline, Python-based summary
     5	# NO createComment to issue #31 (locked at 2500 comments)
     6	
     7	on:
     8	  workflow_dispatch:
     9	    inputs:
    10	      role:
    11	        description: 'analyst | auditor | executor | curator'
    12	        required: true
    13	        type: string
    14	      provider:
    15	        description: 'claude'
    16	        required: false
    17	        default: 'claude'
    18	        type: string
    19	      trace_id:
    20	        description: 'Trace id'
    21	        required: true
    22	        type: string
    23	      cycle_id:
    24	        description: 'Role cycle id'
    25	        required: false
    26	        default: ''
    27	        type: string
    28	      task_type:
    29	        description: 'Task type'
    30	        required: false
    31	        default: 'default_development'
    32	        type: string
    33	      task:
    34	        description: 'Task body'
    35	        required: false
    36	        default: ''
    37	        type: string
    38	  issue_comment:
    39	    types: [created]
    40	  issues:
    41	    types: [opened, assigned]
    42	  pull_request_review_comment:
    43	    types: [created]
    44	  pull_request_review:
    45	    types: [submitted]
    46	
    47	permissions:
    48	  contents: write
    49	  pull-requests: write
    50	  issues: write
    51	  id-token: write
    52	  actions: write
    53	
    54	jobs:
    55	  claude:
    56	    if: |
    57	      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
    58	      (github.event_name == 'issue_comment' && contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@analyst') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@auditor') && !contains(github.event.comment.body, '@executor')) ||
    59	      (github.event_name == 'issues' && (contains(github.event.issue.body, '@claude') || contains(github.event.issue.title, '@claude'))) ||
    60	      (github.event_name == 'pull_request_review_comment' && contains(github.event.comment.body, '@claude')) ||
    61	      (github.event_name == 'pull_request_review' && contains(github.event.review.body, '@claude'))
    62	
    63	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    64	    timeout-minutes: 30
    65	
    66	    steps:
    67	      - name: Checkout repository
    68	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
    69	        with:
    70	          fetch-depth: 1
    71	          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
    72	
    73	      # BEM-934 prompt assembler bridge
    74	      - name: Assemble governed role prompt
    75	        if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    76	        shell: bash
    77	        env:
    78	          INPUT_ROLE: ${{ inputs.role }}
    79	        run: |
    80	          set -euo pipefail
outcome_section:
330	              "raw_execution_log_committed": False,
   331	              "source": "claude_code_action_structured_output",
   332	          })
   333	          receipt.pop("blocker", None)
   334	          write_receipt(receipt)
   335	          PY
   336	
   337	          git config user.email "bem934-claude-materializer@ai-devops-system"
   338	          git config user.name "BEM-934 Claude Materializer"
   339	          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
   340	          git add governance/proofs/BEM934_claude_result_materialization_receipt.json
   341	          if [ -f governance/proofs/BEM934_object_binding_plan.json ]; then
   342	            git add governance/proofs/BEM934_object_binding_plan.json
   343	          fi
   344	          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
   345	            echo "No structured Claude proof changes"
   346	          else
   347	            git commit -m "Materialize BEM-934 Claude binding proof trace=${{ inputs.trace_id }}"
   348	            git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
   349	          fi
   350	
   351	
   352	      - name: Write final result to transport
   353	        if: always() && github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
   354	        shell: bash
   355	        env:
   356	          ROLE_RAW:       ${{ env.ROLE_RAW }}
   357	          TRACE_ID:       ${{ env.TRACE_ID }}
   358	          CYCLE_ID:       ${{ env.CYCLE_ID }}
   359	          TASK_TYPE:      ${{ inputs.task_type }}
   360	          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ inputs.task_type == 'object_runtime_binding' && steps.claude_binding_role.outcome || steps.claude_role.outcome }}
   361	        run: |
   362	          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
   363	          import json, os, subprocess
   364	          from datetime import datetime, timezone
   365	          from pathlib import Path
   366	
   367	          now     = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')
   368	          role    = os.environ.get('ROLE_RAW', 'analyst')
   369	          trace   = os.environ.get('TRACE_ID', 'unknown')
   370	          cycle   = os.environ.get('CYCLE_ID') or ('cycle_' + trace)
   371	          outcome = os.environ.get('CLAUDE_OUTCOME', 'unknown')
   372	          task_type = os.environ.get('TASK_TYPE', '')
   373	
   374	          status  = 'completed' if outcome == 'success' else ('failed' if outcome == 'failure' else outcome)
   375	          blocker = None if outcome == 'success' else ('claude_role outcome=' + outcome)
   376	
   377	          changed = []
   378	          try:
   379	              changed = subprocess.check_output(
   380	                  ['git', 'diff', '--name-only', 'HEAD~1', 'HEAD'], text=True
   381	              ).strip().split('\n')
   382	              changed = [f for f in changed if f]
   383	          except Exception:
   384	              pass
   385	          # BEM-934 live semantic proof validation
   386	          # The Claude action may report a tool-level failure after committing a valid
   387	          # trace-bound proof. Only this narrowly scoped repair task may derive semantic
   388	          # success from strict proof validation; all other task types keep fail-closed behavior.
   389	          if task_type == 'live_content_analysis_repair':
   390	              proof_path = Path('governance/proofs/BEM934_live_content_tg_934432449.json')
   391	              proof_valid = False
   392	              try:
   393	                  proof = json.loads(proof_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
   394	                  acceptance = proof.get('acceptance_checks')
   395	                  acceptance_ok = (
   396	                      isinstance(acceptance, list)
   397	                      and len(acceptance) >= 2
   398	                      and all(
   399	                          isinstance(item, dict) and item.get('result') == 'PASS'
   400	                          for item in acceptance
   401	                      )
   402	                  )
   403	                  proof_valid = (
   404	                      proof.get('status') == 'PASS'
   405	                      and proof.get('protocol') == 'BEM-934'
   406	                      and proof.get('task_id') == 'BEM934-LIVE-TEST'
   407	                      and proof.get('trace_id') == trace
   408	                      and proof.get('provider_selected') == 'claude_code'
   409	                      and proof.get('source_router_receipt')
   410	                          == 'governance/proofs/BEM932_provider_router_tg_934432449_20260618T102008Z.json'
   411	                      and isinstance(proof.get('invariants'), list)
   412	                      and len(proof['invariants']) >= 2
   413	                      and isinstance(proof.get('validation_steps'), list)
   414	                      and len(proof['validation_steps']) >= 2
   415	                      and acceptance_ok
   416	                      and isinstance(proof.get('limitations'), list)
   417	                      and len(proof['limitations']) >= 1
   418	                  )
   419	              except Exception:
   420	                  proof_valid = False
   421	              if proof_valid:
   422	                  outcome = 'success'
   423	                  status = 'completed'
   424	                  blocker = None
   425	
   426	          sha = None
   427	          try:
   428	              sha = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'rev-parse', 'HEAD'], text=True).strip()
   429	          except Exception:
   430	              pass
   431	
   432	          report_path = 'governance/reports/' + trace + '.md'
   433	          Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   434	
   435	          # BEM-488: safe lines join instead of f-string multiline
   436	          lines = [
   437	              '# Claude Role Result - ' + trace,
   438	              '',
   439	              '| Field | Value |',
   440	              '|---|---|',
   441	              '| Trace | ' + trace + ' |',
   442	              '| Role | ' + role + ' |',
   443	              '| Provider | claude |',
   444	              '| Outcome | ' + outcome + ' |',
   445	              '| Status | ' + status + ' |',
   446	              '| Commit SHA | ' + (sha or 'none') + ' |',
   447	              '| Completed at | ' + now + ' |',
   448	              '| Changed files | ' + (', '.join(changed) or 'none') + ' |',
   449	              '',
   450	              ('**Blocker:** ' + blocker) if blocker else '**No blocker.**',
   451	              '',
   452	              'Report written by claude.yml (BEM-477/488). No issue comments.',
   453	          ]
   454	          Path(report_path).write_text('\n'.join(lines) + '\n')
   455	
   456	          Path('governance/transport').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   457	          result = {
   458	              'trace_id':     trace,
   459	              'cycle_id':     cycle,
   460	              'role':         role,
